creator: johann@egenetics.com
text:
will@FreeBSD.org on 2001-04-06 (Fri) at 23:18:53 -0700:
> 
> This port's distfiles suck.

I agree - unversioned distfiles always suck.  :-(

> I updated the checksums on them,
> and got this:
> 
> ===>  Installing for diveintopython-2.6

Please note that I submitted a follow-up to the original PR on 29 March.
This follow-up included a version of the port updated to 2.8 (which is still
current as of this writing).

(Should I rather have had the original PR closed, and submitted a new one?)

> You really need to talk to the author(s) and get them to roll
> VERSIONED distfiles....

I'll get in touch with him and see what I can arrange.

Thanks,
-- Johann
